title: Plowmen
content:
I hear men say to plow the snow.
They cannot mean to plant it, though,
Unless in bitterness to mock
At having cultivated rock.
meaning:
Robert Lee Frost's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Plowmen"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
